meta_title: For Freelancers: Claude Code skills setup to Solve slow development speed (Intermediate Comparison)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome slow development speed. A Intermediate-level Comparison using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Claude Code Setup: Accelerate Your Freelance Dev Workflow
content.seo_description: Stop grinding through boilerplate. Learn how to optimize Claude Code and Antigravity to slash development time and deliver high-end SaaS projects faster.
content.answer_block: To eliminate slow development, integrate Claude Code with Antigravity to automate boilerplate and architectural scaffolding. By delegating repetitive logic to the CLI and leveraging Antigravity’s context-aware generation, you transform manual coding into high-velocity orchestration, allowing you to ship production-ready features in hours instead of days.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a blank IDE, the cursor blinking rhythmically like a countdown to a missed deadline. The client wants a full-stack SaaS MVP by Friday, and you’re still manually configuring database schemas and API routes. The bottleneck isn't your skill; it's the friction of manual implementation.

True velocity as a freelancer comes from moving past syntax and into architecture. By pairing Claude Code’s CLI-native intelligence with the structural precision of Antigravity, you stop writing code and start orchestrating systems. It’s time to stop fighting the editor and start letting the machine do the heavy lifting.

steps.title: Initialize Project Context
steps.description: Establish a clear project baseline by defining your stack and architecture requirements before Claude writes a single line.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze current project architecture. Define a modular structure for a scalable SaaS app using Next.js and Tailwind CSS.

steps.title: Automate Boilerplate Scaffolding
steps.description: Use Antigravity to define your folder structure, then instruct Claude Code to execute the file generation.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a directory tree and boilerplate for a secure authentication module with JWT handling.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --instruction 'Scaffold the directory structure defined in the context files.'

steps.title: Configure Intelligent Context Injection
steps.description: Ensure Claude Code understands your specific coding standards by injecting your existing codebase patterns as reference.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Summarize my current coding style, naming conventions, and preferred library patterns into a project-wide context file.

steps.title: Rapid Feature Implementation
steps.description: Execute complex feature builds by providing high-level business logic to Claude Code while Antigravity manages constraints.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Draft a technical specification for a Stripe-integrated subscription flow using the established auth module.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --instruction 'Implement the stripe subscription flow based on the spec file.'

steps.title: Automated Code Review and Polish
steps.description: Use the combined power of these tools to perform a final audit on security, performance, and clean code principles.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Perform a senior-level code review of the new module, focusing on memory leaks and API security vulnerabilities.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --instruction 'Refactor based on the audit report and ensure full test coverage.'

pro_tips: Create a .claude-ignore file to prevent the AI from indexing massive node_modules or build artifacts, which saves precious context window space.
Always use the 'chain-of-thought' prompt technique in Antigravity before passing tasks to Claude to force logical breakdown of complex features.
Alias your most frequent Claude Code commands in your shell profile to turn multi-step workflows into single-keystroke executions.
Leverage the 'Claude Code' history log as a documentation source for your clients; it serves as a perfect record of your development decisions.
Periodically clear and refresh your context files to ensure the AI isn't hallucinating based on outdated architectural patterns.
content.next_steps: After completing this setup, begin by migrating your smallest micro-service into the Claude Code workflow to validate your environment before tackling core application logic.
content.conversion_block: Stop burning billable hours on repetitive tasks and start scaling your freelance output with professional AI engineering workflows. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
